hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && grep -nEi '(api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|password|passwd|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|private[_-]?key|auth[_-]?token)\s*[=:]\s*["'"'"'][^"'"'"']+' "$FILE" | head -5 | while read -r line; do echo "WARNING: Possible hardcoded secret: $line"; done || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && case "$(basename "$FILE")" in package.json|requirements.txt|pyproject.toml|go.mod|Cargo.toml|Gemfile) echo 'Dependency file changed. Consider running /cloudyrion-security:sbom to check for vulnerabilities.' ;; esac || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && [ -n "$CMD" ] && printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh pr create' && echo 'Opening a PR — consider running /cloudyrion-security:quick-scan first to catch security issues.' || true
